name: Prima.Autocomplete

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Messages your app can listen to.

unions.name: State
unions.comment: Holds the state of the Autocomplete.

aliases.name: Customizations
aliases.type: { placeholder : String, threshold : Int, container : ViewState msg -> Html msg -> Html msg, input : List (Attribute msg) -> Html msg, listContainer : (( data, msg ) -> Html msg) -> List ( data, msg ) -> Html msg, elementContainer : ( data, msg ) -> Html msg }

values.name: config
values.type: (( State, Msg data ) -> msg) -> (data -> Html msg) -> Config data msg

values.name: customConfig
values.type: { toMsg : ( State, Msg data ) -> msg, customizations : Customizations data msg } -> Config data msg

values.name: setInputValue
values.comment: Update the autocomplete value from your app.

values.name: view
values.type: Config data msg -> State -> List data -> Html msg
